prompt:
Create a colorful vintage travel-poster collage for Las Vegas, drawn in hand-painted watercolor, ink sketch, and retro postcard style. Use a vertical 3:4 canvas with warm cream paper texture, rough torn-paper edges, doodled outlines, tape pieces, ticket stubs, stamps, and scrapbook layers. The composition should feel dense, joyful, and information-rich, like a travel journal page full of stickers and handwritten notes.

Main layout: Place a huge red-orange brush-lettered title “Las Vegas” across the top, with black shadow and white highlight edges. Beneath it add a smaller handwritten black subtitle “Las Vegas” with a heart doodle and underline. Fill the middle with an illustrated city landmark panorama: the Paris Las Vegas Eiffel Tower centered, the High Roller wheel behind it, the Paris balloon sign to the right, hotel facades, blue sky, fluffy clouds, a yellow sun, palm trees, and the Bellagio fountains spraying across the lower middle. Add small flying bird doodles in the sky.

Foreground: Include exactly 4 main foreground attractions: 1) a turquoise-and-orange vintage trolley bus labeled “LAS VEGAS” and “FUN RIDE” in the lower left, angled toward the viewer with passengers visible; 2) a large cheeseburger with fries on a plate in the lower center-right; 3) a tall pink cocktail with ice, straw, lime slice, and mint beside the burger; 4) a steaming coffee mug labeled “GOOD TIMES & GOOD COFFEE” on the lower right.

Left side details: Add the classic “WELCOME TO Fabulous LAS VEGAS NEVADA” sign in the left-middle, a vertical “VEGAS” neon sign with a retro cowgirl sitting on it, a palm tree, and an admit-one ride ticket. Bottom left should include a circular stamp reading “DISCOVER,” a red map pin with a dotted travel route, and a purple flower doodle.

Sticker and note count: Include exactly 14 small text stickers or paper notes around the poster, each hand-drawn and slightly tilted: 1) “BEST VACATION” on a beige notepad at top left, 2) “TRAVEL MORE” in a green circle, 3) “BEST MEMORIES” on a pink camera note at top right, 4) “I LOVE LAS VEGAS” on a purple note with a red heart, 5) “CITY TRIP EXPLORE” near the Eiffel Tower, 6) “THE STRIP” on a yellow label near the wheel, 7) “THE LINQ HIGH ROLLER” on a pink label, 8) “PARIS LAS VEGAS” on a yellow label, 9) “BELLAGIO FOUNTAINS” on a teal label, 10) “VINTAGE VEGAS” on a teal label at left, 11) “GOOD VIBES ONLY” on a beige palm-tree note, 12) “ADMIT ONE ENJOY THE RIDE!” on a ticket, 13) “BRIGHT LIGHTS / BIG NIGHTS / GOOD FOOD / MEMORIES THAT LAST!” on a blue checklist, 14) a large torn-paper banner at the bottom reading “WELCOME TO LAS VEGAS” and “DISCOVER THE MAGIC OF LAS VEGAS!”.

Style constraints: Use saturated turquoise, red, orange, yellow, cream, and teal tones; visible pen hatching, imperfect hand lettering, watercolor bleeds, paper grain, playful travel doodles, red hearts, arrows, and underlines. Keep the design busy but readable, with no photorealism and no empty margins.
